card.title: mazer: mobile shell, portrait lock, and device harness
card.summary: Prove the phone-shell path for safe-area placement, exact touch registration, continuous stick intent, portrait behavior, and real-device confidence.
card.objective: Keep the canvas, overlays, and every custom input surface in one live safe-area and coordinate contract while preserving smooth steering and readable mobile UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Options and Pause consume the available safe content rectangle with deliberate device-edge gutters and no hidden HUD reservation.
Scrollable overlay content clips at the true viewport edge and retains partially visible labels during small touch drags.
The rendered touch target and accepted game input agree across iPhone visual-viewport and safe-area origin changes.
Physical phone feel, browser-chrome, and installed-PWA evidence remain required before terminal completion.
discoveries: The mobile Pause shell was independently capped and offset for hidden play HUD even though Options already owned the full overlay surface.
The shared production shell now uses 8px phone gutters and separates fixed title and action lanes from the flexible scroll viewport.
nextActions: Collect operator physical-iPhone screenshots and feel proof for full-height overlays, small guide scrolls, direct turns, T-junctions, and one-tile Smart Steering.
Collect physical touch-alignment proof across browser-chrome and safe-area origin changes.
Continue installed-PWA, authenticated keyboard, and browser-chrome proof without treating emulation as physical closure.
blockers: Physical-device post-deploy feel and safe-area proof remain operator-held.
evidence: Vercel production deployment dpl_2LQxaMdD7Q41XGyr1Z3iQ6K2zmz8 is Ready and aliased to https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
Production 390x844 proof measured an 8/8/374/828 shell, a 24/84/342/626 Pause viewport, a 24/88/342/672 Options viewport, preserved guide-title scroll continuity, and zero browser warnings or errors.

entry.headline: Shared full-height mobile overlay shell is live for physical-device review
completed: Merged PR #79 to Mazer main as 9600cfb42ffce53578d357cdf610e6c8c950d080.
Deployed the exact merge commit to Vercel production as dpl_2LQxaMdD7Q41XGyr1Z3iQ6K2zmz8.
Verified both Pause and Options at 390x844 with full-height 8px gutters, contained content and actions, stable small-drag scroll clipping, and zero browser warnings or errors.
discovered: The overlay-height defect was a shell ownership problem, not a device-size limitation: Pause retained an invisible HUD lane and a separate cap.
next: Use operator iPhone testing to judge overlay-height, scroll feel, safe areas, direct-turn capture, T-junction intent, one-tile lane shifts, touch alignment, and release feel.
